title: National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI): Related links - Canada.ca
content:

## Projects of interest
The Canadian Vaccination Evidence Resource and Exchange Centre, your online immunization resource centre! Building the capacity to improve vaccine acceptance and uptake through the curation of evidence-based resources.
This free, school-based, online learning platform based on a province’s science, health and social studies curriculum, is designed to raise student literacy around the importance of vaccines.  Developed by teachers to inspire digital-age students in support of UNICEF Canada.
- Consultation: Guidelines for the economic evaluation of vaccination programs in Canada
- Publications : Vaccines and immunization
- Committee to Advise on Tropical Medicine and Travel (CATMAT)
